channel.title: Random Encounters on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Arcanum Random Encounters
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about arcanum’s Random Encounters.

item.title: Fallout Random Encounters
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Fallout, Random Encounters and exactly how those things work.
